message:
fix(clippy): resolve bitwise-bool and too-many-lines lints; audit batches 405-406

Fix 2 clippy-deny violations:
- middleware.rs: move #[allow(clippy::needless_bitwise_bool)] to expression
  level for constant-time bearer token comparison
- gf256.rs: add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] to 104-line test function

Audit batch 405: diff audit of ~3,700 lines across 12 modified files
(messaging/{fabric,policy,snapshot,cut,ir,service,redis,mod,explain,privacy},
transport/sink, service/load_balance) — all SOUND.

Audit batch 406: full audit of messaging/consumer.rs (4,746L, 40 tests) —
SOUND. Lease fencing, ack floor gap prevention, obligation lifecycle verified.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
